arts.ttl: Mourinho SACKS ex-Liverpool star days before Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Fenerbahce have terminated Ryan Kent's contract after the player was frozen out. Fenerbahce have announced that they have mutually agreed to terminate the contract of former Liverpool youngster Ryan Kent, who endured a torrid time in Turkey's largest city.

arts.sum: Ed Sheeran has been lauded for his support and backing newly-promoted Ipswich Town with the club's chairman even claiming that it gives them a wider reach than Man United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd all over again? Rangnick BLOWS UP Austria
arts.sum: As relayed by local outlet Profil, Rangnick is at the heart of a major power struggle in the Austrian federation. Ralf Rangnick is at the heart of a massive power struggle that is threatening to tear Austrian football apart.
